title: Refreshed HUD
description:
Redrawn hearts, air bubbles, armor level bar, and hunger.
This texture pack SHOULD work on all versions (If not then DM me) this pack is NOT supposed to feel moded this is meant to feel more or less like a vanilla+ thing.
body:
Have you seen the health bar? It looks mediocre, and the hearts are barely a gradient. However, this texture pack doesn't fix the hearts; it fixes the WHOLE HUD. I have no idea how this snowballed to the ENTIRE HUD, but this is a small texture pack![air bubble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42b14c8604b859661320b55e084a119cfd502ab3.png) => ![air bubble pop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b89d05b39b8ae415a5f766a7000dd96d6ea7be.png) 
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a24433648551cc5a0a4456c9666247b140c78cc5.png)
Honestly, yeah, this is about it.
